items.title: Instagram’s new ‘Instants’ feature combines elements from Snapchat and BeReal
items.summary: The feature lets users share disappearing photos with their Close Friends or mutual followers that can be viewed only once and remain available for 24 hours.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: May's PS Plus Game Catalog additions include Red Dead Redemption 2 and Star Wars Outlaws
items.summary: Premium members are also getting the classic arcade shooter Time Crisis.

items.title: Mark Zuckerberg announces ‘completely private’ encrypted Meta AI chat
items.summary: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg says its new Incognito Chat is "the first major AI product where there is no log of your conversations stored on servers." Messages in Incognito Chat ar...
